CASH FLOW FROM OPERATIONS OF CHF 138.0 M 
(2024: CHF 148.5 M)
› Cash conversion improved to 118% of reported EBITDA (2024: 100%)
› Decreased inventories, increase in accruals and provisions
› Days Sales Outstanding (DSO) at 46 days (2024: 52 days)
› Includes CHF 61.0 M for amortization & depreciation (2024: CHF 66.8 M) and 
CHF 139.5 M impairment of goodwill and PPA asset
› CHF -10.2 m newly capitalized development costs (2024: CHF -7.4 m)

› CHF +112.2 m for financial assets (mainly from time deposits repayment)
› CHF +3.9 m income from Financial Assets (2024: +5.4 m)
› CHF -38.0 m dividend payments (2024: -38.3 m)
› CHF -33.4 m purchase of treasury shares (2024: -28.9 m)
› CHF -100.1 m change in bond financing
